      double BracketedAccelerometerAndGyroscopeIntervalDetectorThresholdFactorOptimizer.optimize()
      Optimizes threshold factor for a static interval detector or measurement generator in order to minimize MSE (Minimum Squared Error) of estimated calibration parameters.
